name: farm_coop_seed_ip_enforcement_stonehaven_37
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Agriculture, the situation tagged internally around farm coop seed ip enforcement stonehaven has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Dana Wolfe
agents.identity: I am Dana Wolfe, the accountable executive on this bridge in Agriculture. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Advisor Jun Park
agents.identity: I am Advisor Jun Park, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Agriculture. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Dana Wolfe must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Dana Wolfe do?
